name: Bette's
what_they_sell: Chicken parmesan sandwiches, perfected over years of SF bar popups
current_order_method: DM for popup location and availability, email list for early access
drop_cadence: Weekly pop-in at rotating SF bars, announced 24 hours ahead on stories
sample_post_caption: parm sando drop tonight at Zeitgeist starting at 7. DM me or email to hold one, first come first served at the door. see you there.

name: Good Luck Bakery
what_they_sell: Seasonal pastries and cakes blending everyday comfort with specialty flavors
current_order_method: Preorder via DM and Google Form link in bio, Venmo payment
drop_cadence: Weekly SF pickups, location varies by drop, announced on stories
sample_post_caption: this week's form is live. miso caramel tart, brown butter financier, and a new seasonal test we're excited about. closes when full, usually within a few hours. link in bio.

name: SF Mochi Mochi
what_they_sell: Handmade daifuku mochi in seasonal and classic flavors, sold in sets
current_order_method: DM to join the order list, Venmo payment, SF pickup
drop_cadence: Bi-weekly drops, Sunset and Richmond District pickup, announced via stories
sample_post_caption: new drop this saturday. strawberry daifuku, matcha red bean, and a seasonal yuzu custard. DM to get on the list before it fills. pickup sunset district 11-1.

name: Mission Tamale
what_they_sell: Handmade tamales in rotating flavors: pork verde, rajas, bean and cheese, seasonal specials
current_order_method: Preorder via Google Form linked in bio, pickup in Mission District
drop_cadence: Saturday drops in the Mission, preorder form opens Tuesdays, closes Thursdays
sample_post_caption: saturday tamale form is open. pork verde, rajas con crema, and a new birria special this week. form closes thursday or when full. mission pickup saturday 10-2.

name: Noe Valley Noodles
what_they_sell: Fresh hand-pulled noodles and chili oil, sold as takeaway meal kits with rotating regional styles
current_order_method: DM to order, Venmo payment, Noe Valley pickup
drop_cadence: Weekly Friday drops, sells out same day
sample_post_caption: friday noodles are up. dan dan meal kit and a new cumin lamb option this week. DM to order, Venmo to lock in. pickup Noe Valley noon to 4.

name: Rice Paper Rolls SF
what_they_sell: Fresh Vietnamese rice paper rolls with rotating protein and herb combinations, sold by the dozen
current_order_method: DM to preorder, text for returning customers, Venmo or cash at pickup
drop_cadence: Thursday drops in Tenderloin, announced Monday on stories
sample_post_caption: thursday rolls. lemongrass shrimp, five spice pork, tofu with herbs. dozen or half dozen. DM now to hold yours, thursday noon-3 in the TL. cash or venmo.
